title: (Bullish Signal) MPWR enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Mar 18, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that MPWR's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 90 similar cases where MPWR's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 80 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 89%. Current price $345.51 crossed the resistance line at $323.49 and is trading between $360.73 resistance and $323.49 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/16/21 - 03/18/21, the price experienced a -13% Downtrend. During the week of 03/11/21 - 03/18/21, the stock fell -0.55%.

https://preview.redd.it/wnjqbjnzc0o61.png?width=1526&format=png&auto=webp&s=c1a46d838137f5dd78a0927d94cc76725e5eacef

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Oscillator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where MPWR's RSI Oscillator exited the oversold zone, 14 of 16 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for MPWR just turned positive on March 17, 2021. Looking at past instances where MPWR's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise in 37 of 44 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

Following a +3.09% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MPWR advanced for three days, in 273 of 369 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

MPWR may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
